name: testSpecialSymbolsInControlNameNotAllowed
description: Verify that error message is displayed when special symbols are entered in the Control name field after clicking create button
descriptionHtml: Verify that error message is displayed when special symbols are entered in the Control name field after clicking create button
statusMessage:
Locator expected to contain text: ERRORInvalid name: 'a@@@@'. It may only contain letters, digits, ampersands (&), hyphens (-), commas (,), periods (.), apostrophes ('), and spaces. Received: Call log: - Locator.expect with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator("[role='alert']") 6 × locator resolved to
…
- unexpected value "ERRORcontrolCode must have a specific value Invalid name: 'a@@@@'. It may only contain letters, digits, ampersands (&), hyphens (-), commas (,), periods (.), apostrophes ('), and spaces."

steps.name: Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0827.224727.24.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' in the Header
Fill in fraud control name: a@@@@
